nasb.text: Now while he was talking with me, I sank into a deep sleep with my face to the ground; but he touched me and made me stand upright.

esv.text: And when he had spoken to me, I fell into a deep sleep with my face to the ground. But he touched me and made me stand up.

cnv.text: 他和我說話的時候，我沉睡了，臉伏在地；他觸摸我，使我站起來。

ccb.text: 他和我说话的时候，我伏在地上昏睡过去，他便轻拍我，扶我起来，
